sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n35691" key="e)nihli/zein" type="gloss" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐνιηλίζειν·</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τὴν Ἐνυάλιον ἑορτὴν ἄγειν,</foreign> Id. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐνίηλος·</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀνόητος,</foreign> Id.</entryFree>
